dialogue_text: It _was_ a curious dream, dear, certainly: but now run in to your tea; it's getting late.
source_excerpt: "Oh, I've had such a curious dream!" said Alice, and she told her sister, as well as she could remember them, all these strange Adventures of hers that you have just been reading about; and when she had finished, her sister kissed her, a...
